boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: direct deposit update with current payroll portal re-authentication.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing current MFA identity and bank effective date.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Unresolved payroll identity plus bank effective date

final_answer: Source records leave the requested direct deposit update boundary open. The controlling control record says the current dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, or scoped to a different action. Policy requires exact source closure before execution. Do not proceed; escalate until current MFA payroll identity and bank effective date are resolved.
open_blockers: current MFA payroll identity plus bank effective date
